reference: My father fell down a flight of stairs. Emergency medical technicians worked on him for about ten minutes to get his heart beating again. Would this time without oxygen to the brain cause him to have significant brain damage? He is in the process of having his body warmed up after being put into an induced coma. He was flown to Tufts in Boston.
text: My father was on a flight of stairs. A few medical technicians worked on him for about 10 minutes to get his heart beating again. With this time without oxygen to the brain causing to have significant brain damage. He is in the process of having his body warmed up after being put into an induced coma. He was flown to Tufts in Boston.
